title: A nonlinear version of the $α$-Kakutani equidistribution problem
abstract: In this work, we extend results of Kakutani; Adler and Flatto; Smilansky; Pollicott and Sewell on the equidistribution of endpoints generated by interval-splitting procedures. We study a nonlinear version of the problem generated by a finite or countable family of $\mathcal{C}^{1+ \varepsilon}$ contractions and prove Lebesgue equidistribution under suitable nonlattice and thermodynamic regularity assumptions.
